description: Style Noteshorts are the coolest bottoms to wear in the current season- literally! Slip into this pair when on a long journey, a casual day at home or at the gym. Pair them with a tee and sports shoes or flip flops to suit the occasion.Product DetailsBlue shorts with two scoop pockets in front, two patch pockets with buttoned loops at the back and a brand badge on the right, welt pocket with buttoned flap on the right side- seam, waistband with loops, zippered fly with button, drawstring at waist for a snug FitMaterial and Care100% CottonWash with like coloursDo not soak, tumble dry or bleachWarm ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 6' and waist 32") is wearing a size M
